name: blueprintflow
description: Blueprint-driven multi-agent collaboration workflow with team roles, task four-piece, verification, PR review flow, and Phase exit gates

interface.longDescription: Run concept lock-in, blueprint writing, phase/milestone planning, milestone breakdown, task four-piece setup, verification, PR review, and phase exit gates with role-based agent collaboration.
defaultPrompt: Use Blueprintflow to plan a multi-agent product workflow.
Use Blueprintflow to run a task from four-piece setup through verification and PR review.
